name: computer-use-for-windows
description: Local Windows computer control tools for Codex via screenshots, mouse, keyboard, and clipboard actions.

interface.shortDescription: Control a Windows desktop from Codex with local safety boundaries.
interface.longDescription: Adds local Windows desktop automation primitives for screenshots, cursor movement, clicking, typing, shortcut keys, and clipboard operations through a small MCP server.
defaultPrompt: Take a screenshot and describe the active window.
Click the visible button at these coordinates.
Type this text into the focused app.
